name: rakka-inference
description: Skills and plugins for working on projects that depend on rakka-inference, the multi-runtime GPU + remote inference layer for the rakka actor runtime.

plugins.name: rakka-inference-ai-skills
plugins.description: Skills for AI coding assistants working on projects that depend on rakka-inference — quickstart, runtime selection, remote providers, hybrid pipelines, deployment, troubleshooting, and adding new backends.
